<!-- Generated by ArDD's install.sh — overwritten only if missing; never
     clobbered on reinstall. Hand-edit freely; changes belong to this
     project, not the ArDD source repo. -->

# AGENTS.md

This project uses [artifact-driven-dev
(ArDD)](https://github.com/tylerpeckenpaugh/artifact-driven-dev). Its
durable workflow state — declared artifacts, plans, tasks, and the
feature register — lives under `.project/`. Start there: read
`.project/README.md` for the reviewer guide to what each file means and
which ones are live versus historical.

ArDD skills are invoked by exact name, ArDD's `$ardd-*` convention:
`$ardd-status`, `$ardd-plan`, `$ardd-implement`, and so on — see
`.project/README.md` and the installed skills under `.agents/skills/`
for the full list.
